description: Identify the world capital city whose longitude is closest to 25.0° East using the 'world_capitals' layer. Navigate to the city center and create a point feature in the 'field_observations' layer named 'Ground_Station_25E'. The feature description must include the city name and its approximate longitude (e.g., 'CityName (24.9)').

metadata.ground_truth_query: SELECT name, longitude FROM world_capitals ORDER BY ABS(longitude - 25.0) LIMIT 1;
